case_title: ACADEMY OF ART COLLEGE vs. GONZALEZ, LAURA et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ACADEMY OF ART COLLEGE
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACADEMY OF ART COLLEGE
DECLARATION RE DUTY TP NOTIFY COURT OF SETTLEMENT OR STAY BY ZEUTZIUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACADEMY OF ART COLLEGE
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 4, INCLUSIVE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-17-1994, CONTINUED TO JUL-21-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS OF PAYMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-21-1995, CONTINUED TO JUL-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DISMISSAL NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACADEMY OF ART COLLEGE GONZALEZ, LAURA
DECLARATION OF WILIIAM J. ZEUTZIUS RE: DEFAULT UNDER STIPULATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACADEMY OF ART COLLEGE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACADEMY OF ART COLLEGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, LAURA $1,436.28 PRINCIPAL, $1,240.27 INTEREST, $1,139.93 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,816.48 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACADEMY OF ART COLLEGE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, LAURA

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-01-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-01-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-03-1994 CONTINUED FROM APR-01-1994 TO MAY-03-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-22-1996, CONTINUED TO JUN-24-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DISMISSAL OR A CRC 525 STATUS REPORT: IF NO DISMISSAL IS FILED PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE A DECLARATION STATING WHEN LAST PAYMENT WILL BE MADE AND WHEN A DISMISSAL WILL BE FILED. (ANY DECLARATION IS DUE AT LEAST 12 DAYS BEFORE 6/24/96) NOTICE SENT BY COURT

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACADEMY OF ART COLLEGE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, LAURA DOES 1 THROUGH 4, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-02-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-03-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-10-1994
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-03-1994, CONTINUED TO JUN-17-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-02-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR APR-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
